---
name: handoff-quality
description: "Use when preparing implementation handoff summaries, acceptance notes, verification coverage, and follow-up backlog updates."
---

# Handoff Quality Skill

Goal
- Produce consistent, implementation-ready handoffs.

Checklist
1. Restate task scope in one line.
2. List touched files only.
3. Summarize what changed and why.
4. State what was verified and what was not run.
5. Add one follow-up item to 00_admin/backlog.md when needed.

Output
- Keep concise and execution-oriented.
